
---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve SocialAI Pro
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

**Brief summary:**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Expected behavior:**
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior:**
A clear description of what actually happened.

## 🔍 Reproduction Steps

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Minimal reproduction case:**
If possible, provide a minimal code example or URL that demonstrates the issue.

## 📱 Environment Information

**Device & Browser:**
- OS: [e.g. macOS 13.1, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 108, Firefox 107, Safari 16]
- Browser Version: [e.g. 108.0.5359.124]
- Screen Resolution: [e.g. 1920x1080, 375x667]

**Application Environment:**
- Environment: [e.g. Development, Production]
- Version/Commit: [e.g. v1.2.3, commit abc123]
- Authentication State: [e.g. Logged in, Logged out]
- User Role: [e.g. Admin, Team Member, Basic User]

## 📸 Screenshots & Media

**Screenshots:**
Add screenshots to help explain your problem. Please include:
- Console errors (F12 Developer Tools)
- Network requests that failed
- UI state when bug occurred

**Screen Recording:**
If applicable, attach a screen recording showing the bug in action.

## 🔧 Technical Details

**Console Errors:**
```
Paste any console errors here
```

**Network Requests:**
```
Include failed API requests, status codes, and response bodies
```

**Additional Context:**
- Does this happen consistently or intermittently?
- Does it happen across different browsers/devices?
- Did this work before? If so, when did it break?
- Any recent changes to your setup?

## 🎯 Impact Assessment

**Severity Level:**
- [ ] Critical - Application unusable
- [ ] High - Major feature broken
- [ ] Medium - Minor feature issue
- [ ] Low - Cosmetic issue

**User Impact:**
- How many users are affected?
- Does this block core functionality?
- Are there workarounds available?

**Business Impact:**
- Does this affect revenue/payments?
- Does this impact social media posting?
- Does this affect user onboarding?

## 💡 Suggested Solution

**Possible Fix:**
If you have an idea of what might be causing the issue or how to fix it, please describe it here.

**Related Issues:**
Link any related issues or PRs: #123

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting, please ensure:
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have included all relevant information above
- [ ] I have tested this in the latest version
- [ ] I have included console errors and screenshots
- [ ] I have provided clear reproduction steps

---

**For Internal Use:**
- Priority: [ ] P0 | [ ] P1 | [ ] P2 | [ ] P3
- Component: [ ] Frontend | [ ] Backend | [ ] Database | [ ] API
- Assignment: @username
